# Studio•Bamo.J®

> The portfolio of Bamo.J® — a creative studio building distinctive digital
> experiences with motion and type. This site is currently a single-page
> placeholder indexing selected work.

## Pages

- [Home](https://bamoj.com/): Studio overview and an index of selected work

## Notes

This site is rendered as a SPA — full content is hydrated client-side. AI
crawlers that execute JavaScript will see the same content a browser does.

Sitemap available at /sitemap.xml. robots.txt at /robots.txt declares the
allow/block policy for individual AI bots (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot,
etc.) — check there for the current state.

## Editing this file

Replace the absolute URLs above with the production domain (matching
NUXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL in .env) at deploy, and expand the page list as routes
evolve past the placeholder. See .claude/skills/aeo/SKILL.md for the full
per-project setup.
